description_long: This chair features a sleek, modern design with a gently curved seat and backrest crafted from dark, polished wood. The seat and backrest are formed from a single, continuous piece, giving it a minimalist and elegant appearance. The armrests are integrated into the frame, extending smoothly from the backrest and curving downward to connect with the legs. The legs are slender and metal, crossing in an X-shape beneath the seat for both stability and visual interest. The wood grain is visible throughout the seat and backrest, adding a touch of natural texture to the otherwise smooth surface. This chair is well-suited for contemporary urban environments such as cafes, waiting areas, or stylish public spaces.
description: A modern chair with a curved wooden seat and backrest, integrated armrests, and slender metal legs in an X-shaped configuration. The dark wood finish and minimalist design make it ideal for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, curved wooden seat and backrest, with armrests extending outward and slender legs visible below.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the continuous curve of the seat and backrest, the integrated armrest, and the distinctive X-shaped metal leg structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, slightly curved backrest and the way the armrests wrap around to meet the back, with the legs angled outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, emphasizing the flowing lines of the armrest and the X-shaped leg support.
